question: What does CSS stand for?
explanation: CSS stands for Cascading Style Sheets, used to style web pages.

question: Which HTML tag is used to link an external CSS file?
explanation: The <link> tag is used to connect external CSS files to HTML.

question: Which property is used to change the background color?
explanation: background-color sets the background color of an element.

question: Which CSS property controls the text size?
explanation: font-size controls the size of text.

question: How do you make text bold in CSS?
explanation: font-weight: bold makes text bold.

question: Which CSS property controls the text color?
explanation: The color property changes text color.

question: How do you display a border around an element?
explanation: border property defines width, style, and color in one line.

question: How do you make a list horizontal in CSS?
explanation: display: inline makes list items appear in a row.

question: Which property is used to change the font of an element?
explanation: font-family sets the typeface of text.

question: Which property is used to change the spacing between letters?
explanation: letter-spacing adjusts space between characters.

question: How do you make a list item marker disappear?
explanation: list-style-type: none removes bullets or numbers.

question: Which CSS property is used to control the layout of flex items?
explanation: All listed properties help control flexbox layout.

question: Which CSS property is used to control the transparency of an element?
explanation: opacity controls transparency of elements.

question: How do you add a shadow to text?
explanation: text-shadow adds shadow effect to text.

question: Which property is used to set the space between lines of text?
explanation: line-height controls spacing between lines.

question: Which property is used to add spacing inside an element?
explanation: padding adds inner spacing inside an element.

question: Which property is used to add spacing outside an element?
explanation: margin adds space outside an element.

question: Which property is used to control the visibility of an element?
explanation: visibility controls whether an element is visible or hidden.

question: Which property is used to control the flow of floated elements?
explanation: clear controls how elements behave around floated items.

question: Which property controls the background image repetition?
explanation: background-repeat controls if/how an image repeats.

question: Which property is used to set the width of an element?
explanation: width sets the horizontal size of an element.

question: Which property is used to set the height of an element?
explanation: height sets the vertical size of an element.

question: Which property is used to center text?
explanation: text-align: center centers text horizontally.

question: Which property is used to change the cursor style?
explanation: cursor property changes mouse pointer style.

question: Which property is used to make an element hidden but still take space?
explanation: visibility: hidden hides element but keeps layout space.

question: Which property is used for smooth transitions?
explanation: transition enables smooth property changes.

question: Which property is used to rotate an element?
explanation: transform: rotate() rotates elements.

question: Which property is used to change stacking order?
explanation: z-index controls overlapping order of elements.

question: Which property is used to control overflow content?
explanation: overflow controls what happens when content exceeds container.

question: Which property is used to set background image size?
explanation: background-size controls how the image is scaled.
